name: Greg Giraldo
bio: Greg Giraldo was an American stand-up comedian and former lawyer best known for his savage, quick-witted turns on Comedy Centrals celebrity roasts. A Columbia graduate and Harvard Law alumnus, he left law for comedy and became a fixture on Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn and a host of the networks stand-up programming. He died in 2010 at age 44 from an accidental prescription drug overdose.

timeline.ev: Stars in ABC sitcom Common Law
Becomes a regular on Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn

accolades: Signature roaster on Comedy Centrals celebrity roasts
Midlife Vices voted No. 1 comedy album of 2009 by Punchline
